name: flutter-mvvm-template
description: Create Flutter MVVM apps with reusable base views, sealed page navigation, common dialog UI, and PM preview workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Create Flutter MVVM apps with sealed pages and PM preview.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills and generator assets for creating Flutter apps with MVVM base classes, reusable page navigation, common alert/action sheet UI, strongly typed sealed page routes, mock API scaffolding, and a product-manager UI preview workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $flutter-mvvm-template to create a Flutter MVVM app.
Use $flutter-mvvm-pm-ui to add an isolated product-manager UI preview.
Generate a Flutter MVVM project with sealed page navigation.
Create a new Flutter MVVM sample project.
